## By category (with summaries)

### Business Growth

- **[Client management for field service businesses](/articles/client-management-field-service)** — Your customer list is your most valuable asset. Here's how good client management — history, notes, and easy access in the field — wins repeat work and better reviews.

### Getting Started

- **[What is field service management software? A complete guide](/articles/field-service-management-software-guide)** — Field service management software runs the moving parts of a mobile business — scheduling, dispatch, routing, clients, and invoicing. Here's what it does and how to choose the right one.
- **[Organise your whole service business in a weekend](/articles/organise-service-business-weekend)** — Drowning in paper, texts, and sticky notes? Here's a calm, weekend-sized plan to get your jobs, schedule, and invoicing under control — for good.

### Invoicing & Payments

- **[Get paid faster: invoicing that actually works for service businesses](/articles/get-paid-faster-service-invoices)** — Late payments are a cash-flow killer. Here's how to send invoices customers pay quickly — clear layouts, the right timing, and automatic reminders.

### Route Planning

- **[Automated route planning: how it works and why it saves hours](/articles/automated-route-planning)** — Automated route planning orders your day's stops for you — cutting drive time, fuel, and admin. Here's how it works and what to expect when you switch from planning by hand.
- **[AI route scheduling software: what it is and how to choose one](/articles/ai-route-scheduling-software)** — AI route scheduling software plans who goes where and when — balancing workloads and drive time automatically. Here's what the 'AI' really does and how to pick the right tool.
- **[Field service route planning software: a buyer's guide](/articles/field-service-route-planning-software)** — Choosing field service route planning software? This buyer's guide covers the features that matter, the questions to ask, and how to avoid paying for enterprise bloat you'll never use.
- **[How to cut drive time with smarter route planning](/articles/cut-drive-time-route-planning)** — Field teams waste hours every week driving badly-ordered routes. Here's how to plan routes that save fuel, fit more jobs in a day, and keep customers happy.

### Scheduling & Jobs

- **[Map-based scheduling: plan your team's day on a map](/articles/map-based-scheduling)** — Map-based scheduling lets you see and plan jobs geographically — drag work between people, spot inefficiencies instantly, and build tighter routes. Here's why it beats a list.
- **[Recurring jobs: the fastest path to predictable revenue](/articles/recurring-jobs-predictable-revenue)** — One-off jobs keep you busy; recurring jobs keep you in business. Here's how to turn one-time customers into reliable, repeating revenue.
